notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-368 — FASTER LOADING: beta now reuses your main app's price data instead of re-downloading the whole ASX market from scratch every visit — so once your customer app has loaded, beta loads much quicker. Your beta portfolio stays completely separate from your real account, exactly as before — ONLY prices are shared, never your holdings or trades. The first load after this update syncs once, then it's fast. Also in v368: the auto-pilot now waits for signals to fully prepare before it runs (fixes 'autobuy finds nothing'), plus a smoother sticky-column scroll. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load it.
